ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label describing the performance metric */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples collected for the metric */,
  "average" REAL /* Average value of the metric */,
  "min" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "error_percent" REAL /* Error percentage of the metric */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Throughput value of the metric */,
  "received_kb_sec" REAL /* Received kilobytes per second */,
  "sent_kb_sec" REAL /* Sent kilobytes per second */,
  "avg_bytes" REAL /* Average bytes for the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., page load, API response) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., milliseconds, bytes) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the metric belongs to */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test the metric was collected during (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the web page */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the web page */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the web page belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the web page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the web page was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application the operation belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric collected during the test */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the web page tested */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation tested */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the performance test */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the performance test */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the performance test in seconds */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., staging, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES web_pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric reported */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "aggregated_data" TEXT /* Aggregated data for the performance metric */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., performance engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user granted the permission */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric the user can access */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was granted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance test */,
  "num_users" INTEGER /* Number of users simulated during the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of performance test (e.g., load test, stress test) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance test where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message describing the issue */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the error */,
  "error_source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., server, client) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who encountered the error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)
